title: ROMANIA enforcement action against SC Hayat Dent SRL (2,000)
summary: Insufficient cooperation with supervisory authority The Romanian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 2,000 on SC Hayat Dent SRL. The DPA has started an investigation into the controller due to a possible violation. The controller failed to cooperate adequately with the DPA, resulting in the DPA issuing a warning and ordering the controller to s...
